form.formComment: Back from a spell. Finished off last preparation when last of 8 at Lingfield All Weather January 31 over 1000m, 4 len behind Atomic Force with 60kg at $26. When resuming last campaign ran last of 8 at Windsor May 19 over 1020m, 12 len behind Regal Envoy with 61kg at $41. See how he returns.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up previously. First-up second last of 7 at Southwell All Weather on March 13 over 1200m, 5.5 len behind Brazilian Rose with 58kg at $5. Second run from a spell won by a nose at Newcastle All Weather March 27 over 1000m defeating Mon Na Slieve with 57kg at $11. Rates highly and sure to play a big role.

form.formComment: Gelding returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Finished off last preparation seventh of 11 at Kempton Park All Weather October 8 over 1200m, 6 len behind Dapper Valley carrying 61kg at $6. Previously first up; fourth of 13 at Southwell All Weather April 6 2025 over 1020m, 2.75 len behind Completely Random with 60kg at $5. Can play a major role.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-7.5). Gelding returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. previousStarts.stewardsComment: Denied a clear run approaching the final furlong.

form.formComment: Second-up. Comes off a 50-day let-up. First-up after 14 months 5th of 11 at Southwell All Weather on February 20 over 1000m, 2.25 len behind Master Of My Fate with 59.5kg at $4.50. Previously second-up made ground from midfield; 3rd of 12 at Sha Tin All Weather on November 24 2024 over 1200m, 2 len behind Offroad Master carrying 61kg at $4.10. He is capable of testing this field.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Approaching the 1000m, lay in towards California Deeply and was steadied.

form.formComment: Recent form sound. Comes off a 33 day let-up. Most recently 2nd of 7 at Wolverhampton on March 9 over 1000m, 1.0 len behind Moulin Booj carrying 61kg at $4. The start before that sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 4th of 11 at Southwell All Weather on February 20 over 1000m, 1.5 len behind Master Of My Fate with 61kg at $8.50. Has ability and can run a forward race.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Anticipated the start and as a result slowly away.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after five months 9th of 17 at Doncaster on March 29 over 1000m, 7 len behind Spoof carrying 60.5kg at $17. Previously second-up ran last of 10 at Haydock Park on October 17 over 1000m, 7 len behind Son Of Astar with 61kg at $9.50. Fitter but looks a forlorn hope.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after six months won by 2.25 len at Chelmsford March 26 over 1000m defeating Fiorella Princess carrying 56.5kg at $13. Previously second-up got back early 6th of 8 at Lingfield on June 3 over 1020m, 5.5 len behind Solar Edge carrying 61kg at $5. Back in good order and can play a role in the finish.
